reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Un dia no me anduvo la serviclub porque no tenían sistema, me hicieron un vale, fui a los 3 dias de vuelta y me los dieron. Es facil de acceder y son rápidos. Sin complicación alguna. Aparte es la más barata en la ciudad

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. One day the Serviclub machine wasn't working because their system was down, but they gave me a voucher, I went back three days later and they gave it to me. It's easy to access and they're fast. No complications at all. Plus, it's the cheapest in the city.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvZ2JHb013EAE
